summary: Comprehensive testing of the redesigned landing page with Neon-Noir/Bioluminescent theme. All 23 UI tests passed (100%). Landing page features working correctly with smooth Framer Motion animations, distinct section backgrounds, and proper navigation.

issues: Navbar text wrapping on 'How it works' link - minor visual issue

passed_tests: Floating pill navbar visible with logo, nav links (Features, How it works, Scenarios), and Start Free button
Navbar has data-testid='navbar'
Logo button (data-testid='logo-button') visible and navigates to /
Nav Start Free button (data-testid='nav-start-btn') navigates to /chat -> /auth redirect
Hero section (data-testid='hero-section') displays with heading 'Learn any language by speaking it'
Hero subtitle displays '50+ languages' highlighted in emerald green
Hero language ticker shows animated greetings (Bonjour, Hola, Ciao, etc.)
Hero Start button (data-testid='hero-start-btn') navigates to /chat -> /auth
Hero Dashboard button (data-testid='hero-dashboard-btn') navigates to /dashboard -> /auth
Features section (data-testid='features-section') displays with id='features'
Features section shows 4 feature cards: Voice-First, Karaoke Tracking, Live AI Tools, Adaptive Curriculum
Features section has emerald background (#022c22)
How it works section (data-testid='tools-section') has id='how-it-works'
How it works section shows 4 numbered steps (01-04): Speak naturally, AI analyzes, Get feedback, Level up
How it works section has blue background (#172554)
Demo section (data-testid='demo-section') displays animated chat simulation
Demo Try it yourself button (data-testid='demo-try-btn') navigates to /chat -> /auth
Demo section has violet background (#2e1065)
Scenarios section (data-testid='scenarios-section') has id='scenarios'
Scenarios section shows 5 horizontally scrolling cards: Job Interview, Travel, Restaurant, Small Talk, Business
Scenarios section has stone background (#1c1917)
CTA section (data-testid='cta-section') displays 'Stop studying. Start speaking.' heading
CTA Begin lesson button (data-testid='cta-start-btn') navigates to /chat -> /auth
Footer (data-testid='footer') shows logo, Practice/Dashboard/Vocabulary links
Footer Practice link navigates to /chat -> /auth
Footer Dashboard link navigates to /dashboard -> /auth
Footer Vocabulary link navigates to /vocabulary -> /auth
Scroll progress bar appears at top when scrolling (gradient: indigo -> emerald -> pink)
Anchor links work: #features, #how-it-works, #scenarios scroll to correct sections
Mobile responsive (390px): Navbar condenses, hero stacks, cards single column
Tablet responsive (768px): Layout adapts properly
critical_code_review_comments: Landing page uses Framer Motion extensively for animations - scroll reveals, parallax, word-by-word reveals
GlowCard component implements glassmorphism with mouse-following gradient effect
Particles component creates floating ambient particles per section
Section backgrounds correctly configured: hero=#020617, features=#022c22, tools=#172554, demo=#2e1065, scenarios=#1c1917, cta=#020617
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Navigation uses React Router's useNavigate for client-side routing
Navbar uses scroll-based state change for background opacity
GreetingTicker implements infinite horizontal scroll animation
ChatDemo component animates messages sequentially when section comes into view
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign with Neon-Noir theme fully tested. All data-testids work: navbar, logo-button, nav-start-btn, hero-section, hero-start-btn, hero-dashboard-btn, features-section, tools-section, demo-section, demo-try-btn, scenarios-section, cta-section, cta-start-btn, footer. All navigation buttons redirect to /auth for unauthenticated users. Anchor navigation (#features, #how-it-works, #scenarios) works correctly. Auth page uses indigo accent (#6366f1). Demo account: demo@mumble.app / demo123. Mobile and tablet responsive.
